fundamentals.summary: Curated subset of ~108 most-used Unicode emoji with English names, keywords, and groups. Use for chat-UI pickers, reaction palettes, accessibility alt-text, and shortcode-to-emoji LLM hints.
fundamentals.license_note: Emoji codepoints + canonical names: Unicode Consortium. Keyword sets: editorial.

_notes: Fourth fundamental category (spec §8 emoji-catalog). Shipped 2026-05-14. v1 ships 'common' (~108 emoji). Future: `unicode-15-en` full catalog (~3,800 entries), `gaming-emoji` filtered subset, `skin-tone-aware`. Skill surface (builtin.emoji.search by keyword) and runtime_global (window.mchatai.emoji) deferred until a real consumer asks.
